title: Lawyer Referral Services * Adolescents - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Lawyer Referral Services * Adolescents 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE BAR YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lawyers volunteer as Problem Solvers to offer legal information and advice to children and youth through a 30-minute consultation. This service is not available in all areas. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS
